text:
### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The system shall generate a report of the detected and analyzed vulnerabilities

### Response:
[{"title": "Vulnerability Report Generation", "body": "### Objective
Generate a report of detected and analyzed vulnerabilities.

### Technical Description
The system shall parse vulnerability data from various sources (e.g. scanners, manual input) and generate a report in a standardized format (e.g. CSV, PDF). The report shall include the following information: vulnerability ID, description, severity, and potential impact.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop a data model for vulnerability data.
- [ ] Implement a parsing algorithm for vulnerability data.
- [ ] Design a report generation template.
- [ ] Test report generation functionality.", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The system shall inspect the website or web application

### Response:
[{"title": "Website Inspector", "body": "### Objetivo
Automatically inspect the website or web application to identify its structure, functionality, and potential issues.

### Descrição Técnica
The system shall use web scraping techniques and API integrations to gather information about the website or web application. This includes analyzing HTML, CSS, and JavaScript files, as well as monitoring network requests and responses.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop a web scraping framework to extract website structure and content.
- [ ] Integrate APIs to gather additional information about the website or web application.
- [ ] Implement functionality to monitor network requests and responses.
- [ ] Conduct unit testing and integration testing to ensure the system is working correctly.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Website Inspector: Infrastructure", "body": "### Objetivo
Design and implement the infrastructure for the website inspector system, including server, database, and storage.

### Descrição Técnica
The system shall be built using a cloud-based infrastructure, with a focus on scalability, reliability, and security. The database shall be designed to store and retrieve information about the inspected websites.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and deploy a cloud-based infrastructure for the website inspector system.
- [ ] Develop a database schema to store information about inspected websites.
- [ ] Implement data storage solutions for storing and retrieving data.
- [ ] Conduct load testing and performance testing to ensure the system is scalable and reliable.

Labels: [infrastructure, backend]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}, {"title": "Website Inspector: Frontend", "body": "### Objetivo
Develop a user-friendly frontend interface for the website inspector system, allowing users to input website URLs and view inspection results.

### Descrição Técnica
The frontend interface shall be built using a modern frontend framework, with a focus on usability, accessibility, and responsiveness. The interface shall allow users to input website URLs, view inspection results, and filter or sort inspection data.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement a user-friendly frontend interface for the website inspector system.
- [ ] Develop a user input mechanism for inputting website URLs.
- [ ] Implement data visualization and filtering/sorting functionality.
- [ ] Conduct usability testing and accessibility testing to ensure the frontend interface is user-friendly and accessible.

Labels: [frontend]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:
The system shall inspect SSL certificate

### Response:
[{"title": "Verify SSL Certificate Inspection", "body": "### Objective
Inspection of SSL certificates for verification purposes.

### Technical Description
The system shall inspect SSL certificates to ensure they are valid and trustworthy. This includes verifying the certificate's subject, issuer, and expiration date.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop a certificate inspection module.
- [ ] Implement certificate validation logic.
- [ ] Test certificate inspection functionality.
- [ ] Integrate certificate inspection with existing system components.

Labels: backend, api", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The system shall identify acceptable low false positive rates

### Response:
[{"title": "Low False Positive Rate Identification", "body": "### Objective
Identify acceptable low false positive rates in the system.

### Technical Description
The system shall utilize advanced algorithms and machine learning techniques to minimize false positive rates. This includes implementing strategies for filtering out irrelevant data and validating results.

### Tasks
- [ ] Conduct research on existing algorithms and techniques for false positive rate minimization.
- [ ] Design and implement a system architecture for low false positive rate identification.
- [ ] Develop and test the algorithm for filtering out irrelevant data.
- [ ] Integrate the algorithm with the system for low false positive rate identification.

#backend #api #machine-learning", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The system shall generate a report for the detected vulnerability

### Response:
[{"title": "Vulnerability Report Generation", "body": "### Objective
Generate a report for the detected vulnerability.

### Description
The system shall generate a report that summarizes the detected vulnerability, including information such as vulnerability type, severity, and recommended remediation steps.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the report format and structure.
- [ ] Implement the report generation logic.
- [ ] Integrate the report generation with the vulnerability detection module.
- [ ] Test the report generation functionality.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The system shall analyze the detected vulnerability

### Response:
[{"title": "Vulnerability Analysis", "body": "### Objetivo
Analisar vulnerabilidades detectadas no sistema.

### Descrição Técnica
O sistema deve ser capaz de analisar vulnerabilidades detectadas e fornecer informações relevantes sobre a vulnerabilidade, incluindo a gravidade e recomendações para resolução.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implementar modelo de aprendizado automático para análise de vulnerabilidades.
- [ ] Desenvolver API para fornecer informações sobre vulnerabilidades.
- [ ] Integrrar sistema com banco de dados para armazenar informações sobre vulnerabilidades.
- [ ] Implementar pipeline de CI/CD para automatizar testes e build do sistema.", "labels": ["backend", "api", "machine-learning"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
The system shall detect SQL Injection and XSS vulnerabilities for a given website or a web application

### Response:
[{"title": "Vulnerability Detection - SQL Injection and XSS", "body": "### Objective
Detect SQL Injection and XSS vulnerabilities for a given website or web application.

### Technical Description
Develop a system that analyzes the website's or web application's code and detects potential SQL Injection and XSS vulnerabilities.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and implement algorithms for detecting SQL Injection vulnerabilities.
- [ ] Implement XSS vulnerability detection using known attack vectors.
- [ ] Develop a system for analyzing and classifying detected vulnerabilities.
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing and validation of the system.

Labels: [backend, api]", "labels": ["technical-debt"]}]

### Input:
As an librarian, I want to update books in the library.

### Response:
[{"title": "Update Book Information", "body": "### Objective
Update book information in the library database.

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
As an librarian, I want to remove books from the library.

### Response:
[{"title": "Remove Books from Library", "body": "### Objective
Remove books from the library, ensuring data consistency and security.

### Technical Description
This issue involves modifying the existing book management system to include a feature for removing books from the library. The system should validate the book's existence before deletion, and update the corresponding records in the database.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement book removal logic in the backend API.
- [ ] Update database schema to track book removals.
- [ ] Test book removal feature with sample data.
- [ ] Review and refine book removal logic as needed.
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Input:
As an librarian, I want to read books in the library.

### Response:
[{"title": "Library Book Reading", "body": "### Objective
Implement a system for librarians to read books within the library.

The system should allow librarians to access a database of available books and read them on a digital device. The system should be scalable to accommodate a large number of books and librarians.

### Tasks

- [ ] Implement the database integration.
- [ ] Develop the digital reading interface.
- [ ] Test the system for scalability and usability.

", "labels": ["backend", "database", "api"]}]

Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
As an librarian, I want to delete books in the library.

### Response:
[{"title": "Delete Books from Library API", "body": "### Objective
Delete books from the library API to ensure data consistency and maintain accurate book inventory.

### Technical Description
Implement a secure API endpoint that accepts book IDs as input and removes the corresponding book records from the database.

### Tasks
- [ ] Create API endpoint to delete books
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization for the API endpoint
- [ ] Test API endpoint with sample data
- [ ] Document API endpoint and its usage", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
As an librarian, I want to create books in the library.

### Response:
[{"title": "Book Creation System", "body": "### Objective
Create a system to create books in the library.

### Technical Description
The system should allow librarians to create new books, including title, author, and summary. It should also store metadata about the book, such as publication date and genre.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the database schema for book metadata
- [ ] Develop a RESTful API for creating new books
- [ ] Implement business logic for book creation
- [ ] Test the book creation system with sample data
- [ ] Deploy the system to the production environment
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Book Metadata Model", "body": "### Objective
 Define the metadata model for book creation.

### Technical Description
The metadata model should include fields for title, author, publication date, and genre. It should also allow for additional metadata fields to be added in the future.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the metadata model schema
- [ ] Implement the metadata model in the database
- [ ] Test the metadata model with sample data
", "labels": ["backend", "database"]}, {"title": "User Interface for Book Creation", "body": "### Objective
Create a user-friendly interface for librarians to create new books.

### Technical Description
The interface should allow librarians to input title, author, and summary, and include a preview of the book's metadata.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design the user interface for book creation
- [ ] Implement the user interface using a frontend framework
- [ ] Test the user interface with sample data
", "labels": ["frontend"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
As an librarian, I want to calculate fines for the due date.

### Response:
[{"title": "Calculate Fines for Due Date", "body": "### Objective
Calculate the total fine for each book that is overdue.

### Technical Description
The system should be able to retrieve the due date for each book and calculate the fine based on the number of days the book is overdue. The fine should be calculated using a formula that takes into account the type of book and the library's fine policy.

### Tasks
- [ ] Create a database schema to store book due dates and fines.
- [ ] Implement a function to calculate the fine for each overdue book.
- [ ] Integrate the fine calculation function with the library's catalog system.
- [ ] Test the fine calculation functionality to ensure it is accurate and working correctly.

", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
A reliable video conferencing platform that enables high-quality video and audio communication for remote teams, webinars, and online events. The system must integrate with external tools such as calendar applications, CRMs, and project management software. MeetSphere should provide secure authentication with OAuth2 and SAML support. Implement caching mechanisms, like Memcached, for improved performance and real-time communication.

### Response:
[{"title": "MeetSphere Core Features", "body": "### Overview
MeetSphere is a reliable video conferencing platform that enables high-quality video and audio communication for remote teams, webinars, and online events.

### Technical Description
The system must integrate with external tools such as calendar applications, CRMs, and project management software. MeetSphere should provide secure authentication with OAuth2 and SAML support. Implement caching mechanisms, like Memcached, for improved performance and real-time communication.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement video conferencing functionality using WebRTC
- [ ] Integrate with calendar applications (e.g. Google Calendar, Microsoft Exchange)
- [ ] Integrate with CRMs (e.g. Salesforce, HubSpot)
- [ ] Implement secure authentication with OAuth2 and SAML support
- [ ] Implement caching mechanisms using Memcached
- [ ] Develop real-time communication features", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "MeetSphere User Interface", "body": "### Overview
MeetSphere requires a user-friendly interface for remote teams, webinars, and online events. The interface should be intuitive, easy to use, and responsive.

### Technical Description
The UI should integrate with the MeetSphere core features, allowing users to initiate and manage video conferencing sessions, view meeting details, and interact with attendees.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and develop a responsive and user-friendly UI for MeetSphere
- [ ] Integrate UI with MeetSphere core features
- [ ] Implement meeting initiation and management functionality
- [ ] Develop attendee interaction features (e.g. chat, screen sharing)", "labels": ["frontend", "ui"]}, {"title": "MeetSphere Infrastructure and Deployment", "body": "### Overview
MeetSphere requires a scalable and reliable infrastructure to support a large number of users and concurrent video conferencing sessions. The platform should be deployed on a cloud-based infrastructure (e.g. AWS, Azure, Google Cloud).

### Technical Description
MeetSphere should be deployed on a cloud-based infrastructure, with automated deployment and scaling using Kubernetes or Docker. Implement load balancing and monitoring to ensure high availability and performance.

### Tasks
- [ ] Choose a cloud-based infrastructure (e.g. AWS, Azure, Google Cloud)
- [ ] Deploy MeetSphere on the chosen infrastructure
- [ ] Implement automated deployment and scaling using Kubernetes or Docker
- [ ] Implement load balancing and monitoring for high availability and performance", "labels": ["infrastructure", "deployment"]}, {"title": "MeetSphere Security and Compliance", "body": "### Overview
MeetSphere requires a robust security and compliance framework to ensure the confidentiality, integrity, and availability of user data. The platform should comply with relevant regulations and standards (e.g. GDPR, HIPAA).

### Technical Description
MeetSphere should implement robust security measures, including encryption, access controls, and audit logging. Implement compliance frameworks to ensure MeetSphere meets regulatory requirements.

### Tasks
- [ ] Implement robust security measures (e.g. encryption, access controls, audit logging)
- [ ] Comply with relevant regulations and standards (e.g. GDPR, HIPAA)
- [ ] Develop a compliance framework to ensure MeetSphere meets regulatory requirements", "labels": ["security", "compliance"]}]

### Instruction:
Read the software project description and produce structured GitHub issues that represent the core engineering tasks needed to build the system, including architecture, backend, frontend, APIs, infrastructure, testing, and deployment.

### Input:
An end-to-end logistics management platform that automates shipment planning, tracking, and optimization. The system must integrate with external tools such as GPS devices, warehouse management software, and transportation management systems. LogiSphere should provide secure authentication with OAuth2 and SAML support. Implement caching mechanisms, like Memcached, for improved performance and data accessibility.

### Response:
[{"title": "LogiSphere End-to-End Logistics Management Platform", "body": "### Objective
Automate shipment planning, tracking, and optimization for a comprehensive logistics management platform.

### Description
LogiSphere will integrate with external tools such as GPS devices, warehouse management software, and transportation management systems.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement APIs for seamless integration with external tools.
- [ ] Implement caching mechanisms (e.g., Memcached) for improved performance and data accessibility.
- [ ] Develop secure authentication using OAuth2 and SAML support.
- [ ] Integrate GPS devices and warehouse management software.
- [ ] Integrate transportation management systems.
- [ ] Develop and implement shipment planning and tracking features.
- [ ] Optimize shipment routes for improved logistics efficiency.", "labels": ["backend", "api", "integration"]}, {"title": "LogiSphere Secure Authentication", "body": "### Objective
Implement secure authentication using OAuth2 and SAML support.

### Description
This feature will ensure secure access to the LogiSphere platform.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement OAuth2 and SAML authentication mechanisms.
- [ ] Integrate authentication with existing APIs and external tools.
- [ ] Conduct security testing and auditing to ensure secure authentication.", "labels": ["security", "backend"]}, {"title": "LogiSphere Caching Mechanisms", "body": "### Objective
Implement caching mechanisms (e.g., Memcached) for improved performance and data accessibility.

### Description
This feature will enhance the LogiSphere platform's performance and responsiveness.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement caching mechanisms (e.g., Memcached).
- [ ] Integrate caching with existing APIs and data sources.
- [ ] Conduct performance testing and auditing to ensure effective caching.", "labels": ["performance", "backend"]}, {"title": "LogiSphere Integration with External Tools", "body": "### Objective
Integrate LogiSphere with external tools such as GPS devices, warehouse management software, and transportation management systems.

### Description
This feature will enable seamless communication and data exchange between LogiSphere and external systems.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement APIs for integration with GPS devices, warehouse management software, and transportation management systems.
- [ ] Conduct testing and auditing to ensure successful integration.", "labels": ["integration", "backend"]}, {"title": "LogiSphere Shipment Planning and Tracking", "body": "### Objective
Develop and implement shipment planning and tracking features.

### Description
This feature will enable users to plan and track shipments effectively.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement shipment planning features.
- [ ] Implement shipment tracking and monitoring capabilities.
- [ ] Conduct testing and auditing to ensure effective shipment planning and tracking.", "labels": ["backend", "features"]}, {"title": "LogiSphere Optimization", "body": "### Objective
Optimize shipment routes for improved logistics efficiency.

### Description
This feature will enhance the LogiSphere platform's ability to optimize shipment routes and reduce logistics costs.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement algorithms for optimizing shipment routes.
- [ ] Integrate optimization with existing APIs and data sources.
- [ ] Conduct testing and auditing to ensure effective optimization.", "labels": ["optimization", "backend"]}]

### Input:
The gaming console connects with a cloud gaming service.

### Response:
[{"title": "Cloud Gaming Service Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate gaming console with cloud gaming service to provide seamless gaming experience.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve establishing a secure connection between the gaming console and the cloud gaming service. This will require setting up APIs, handling authentication and authorization, and implementing data encryption.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement cloud gaming service API integration
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms
- [ ] Encrypt data transmitted between gaming console and cloud gaming service
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing to ensure seamless integration
", "labels": ["backend", "api"]}, {"title": "Gaming Console Authentication", "body": "### Objective
Implement secure authentication mechanism for gaming console to interact with cloud gaming service.

### Technical Description
The authentication mechanism will involve setting up a secure token-based system, where the gaming console receives a token after successful login, which can be used to authenticate subsequent requests to the cloud gaming service.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement token-based authentication system
- [ ] Integrate authentication mechanism with cloud gaming service API
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing to ensure secure authentication
", "labels": ["backend", "security"]}, {"title": "Cloud Gaming Service Data Storage", "body": "### Objective
Design and implement a data storage solution for cloud gaming service to store and manage gaming data.

### Technical Description
The data storage solution will involve designing a scalable and secure database schema to store gaming data, such as game saves, player profiles, and game statistics. The solution will also require implementing data encryption and access control mechanisms.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement database schema for cloud gaming service
- [ ] Implement data encryption and access control mechanisms
- [ ] Conduct thorough testing to ensure secure and reliable data storage
", "labels": ["backend", "database", "security"]}]

### Input:
The data analysis tool integrates with a machine learning platform.

### Response:
[{"title": "Machine Learning Platform Integration", "body": "### Objective
Integrate the data analysis tool with a machine learning platform to enable seamless data processing and analysis.

### Technical Description
The integration will involve API calls to the machine learning platform to retrieve and process data. The data analysis tool will also need to handle authentication and authorization with the machine learning platform.

### Tasks
- [ ] Research and select a suitable machine learning platform for integration.
- [ ] Design and implement the API integration with the machine learning platform.
- [ ] Implement authentication and authorization mechanisms to ensure secure data transfer.
- [ ] Test the integration to ensure seamless data processing and analysis.", "labels": ["backend", "api", "integration"]}, {"title": "Data Processing and Analysis", "body": "### Objective
Enable the data analysis tool to process and analyze data from the machine learning platform.

### Technical Description
The data analysis tool will need to handle large datasets and perform complex analyses to extract valuable insights. The tool will also need to be able to visualize the results to facilitate data exploration.

### Tasks
- [ ] Develop algorithms for data processing and analysis.
- [ ] Implement data visualization capabilities to facilitate data exploration.
- [ ] Test the data processing and analysis features to ensure accurate and reliable results.", "labels": ["backend", "data science", "visualization"]}, {"title": "Security and Authentication", "body": "### Objective
Ensure the integration with the machine learning platform is secure and authenticated.

### Technical Description
The integration will require authentication and authorization mechanisms to ensure that only authorized users can access the data and perform analyses.

### Tasks
- [ ] Design and implement authentication and authorization mechanisms.
- [ ] Test the authentication and authorization mechanisms to ensure secure data transfer.", "labels": ["security", "authentication", "authorization"]}]

[{"title": "API Connectivity", "body": "### Objective

This issue involves designing and implementing the API integration to enable seamless data exchange between the two systems.

### Tasks

- [ ] Design the API interface for the restaurant reservation platform.
- [ ] Implement the API integration using the chosen programming language and framework.

### Technical Description

### Tasks

- [ ] Design the database schema and data model.
- [ ] Design the API architecture and integration with the table management system.

Design the database schema and data model for the restaurant reservation platform.

### Technical Description
This issue involves designing the database to store and manage reservation data, including tables, relationships, and data types.

### Tasks

Develop the frontend for the restaurant reservation platform, including user interface and user experience.

This issue involves designing and implementing the frontend using the chosen programming language and framework.

Establish a Continuous Integration and Continuous Deployment (CI/CD) pipeline for the restaurant reservation platform.

### Technical Description
This issue involves setting up the CI/CD pipeline to automate testing, building, and deployment of the platform.

### Input:
The fleet management software features a GPS tracking system.
